name: Panel Title
helpText: Header title displayed at the top of the panel.

name: Footer Text
helpText: Footer text displayed below the sub-cards.

name: Accent Color
helpText: Override the border glow accent (CSS color, e.g. #06F5FF). Leave blank for default cyan.

name: Tooltip Content (Override)
helpText: Override the dynamic card-level tooltip. Leave empty for auto-generated summary.

name: Card 1 — Title
helpText: Title label for the first sub-card.

name: Card 1 — Sub-Footer
helpText: Context text below the value.

name: Card 1 — Tooltip Label
helpText: Hover tooltip label.

name: Card 1 — Tooltip Value
helpText: Hover tooltip value.

name: Card 1 — Prefix
helpText: Text prepended to the formatted value (e.g. '$' or 'LKR ').

name: Card 1 — Suffix
helpText: Text appended to the formatted value (e.g. '%' or 'M').

name: Card 1 — Divider
helpText: Divide the raw value by this number before display (e.g. 1000000 for millions).

name: Card 1 — Decimals
helpText: Number of decimal places for this card's value.

name: Card 2 — Title
helpText: Title label for the second sub-card.

name: Card 2 — Sub-Footer
helpText: Context text below the value.

name: Card 2 — Tooltip Label
helpText: Hover tooltip label.

name: Card 2 — Tooltip Value
helpText: Hover tooltip value.

name: Card 2 — Prefix
helpText: Text prepended to the formatted value.

name: Card 2 — Suffix
helpText: Text appended to the formatted value.

name: Card 2 — Divider
helpText: Divide the raw value by this number before display.

name: Card 2 — Decimals
helpText: Number of decimal places for this card's value.

name: Card 3 — Title
helpText: Title label for the third sub-card.

name: Card 3 — Sub-Footer
helpText: Context text below the value.

name: Card 3 — Tooltip Label
helpText: Hover tooltip label.

name: Card 3 — Tooltip Value
helpText: Hover tooltip value.

name: Card 3 — Prefix
helpText: Text prepended to the formatted value.

name: Card 3 — Suffix
helpText: Text appended to the formatted value.

name: Card 3 — Divider
helpText: Divide the raw value by this number before display.

name: Card 3 — Decimals
helpText: Number of decimal places for this card's value.
